reviews.comment:
Un solo pibe despachando Nafta y encima atiende 1 auto por vez, si andas apurado andá a Hermanos Paredes Sarmiento y Rivadavia. Lo que si los playeros en general muy amables

(Translated by Google)
Only one guy pumping gas, and he only serves one car at a time. If you're in a hurry, go to Hermanos Paredes Sarmiento and Rivadavia. The beach attendants are generally very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwLUs2aXZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los boxes de YPF son lo más.  El que lo atiende  es un capo. Muy acertadas todas sus recomendaciones . Muuuy recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF service stations are the best. The guy who runs them is a pro. All his recommendations are spot on. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwemRleFVREAE

reviews.comment:
No me agradó el café, estaba frío.
Si bien compensó la atención del personal, no fue de mí agrado.

(Translated by Google)
I didn't like the coffee; it was cold.
While the staff's attention made up for it, it wasn't to my liking.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNweXAzS0ZBEAE

reviews.comment:
La mejor estación de servicio de Esquel. Por no decir que es prácticamente a la única que voy. Buena atención de los empleados de playa. Lástima que la confitería no sea 24 hs.

(Translated by Google)
The best gas station in Esquel. It's practically the only one I go to. The attendants are very helpful. It's a shame the café isn't open 24 hours.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwZ09YV3ZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
ACA Esquel ha desmejorado la atención en el despacho de combustible. El personal ha cambiado y esto es notorio. En cuanto a baños muy bien, siempre limpios y en condiciones. En la cafetería siempre tienen buena atención.
Soy socio del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
ACA Esquel has seen a decline in service at the fuel station. The staff has changed, and it's noticeable. The restrooms are very good, always clean and in good condition. The cafeteria always has good service.
I'm an ACA member.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4MWF5QWZnEAE
